subject: A mounted Mardu warrior charging on horseback through a battlefield, raising a curved blade overhead with a fiery banner or wing-like plume erupting behind, leading a war charge
description: A horseback warrior charges forward across a smoke-and-fire-choked battlefield, sword raised high. Behind the rider, a great fiery plume sweeps upward like a wing or banner of flame, suggesting the ferocity and speed of the Mardu horde. The palette is dominated by gold, ember-orange, and dusty browns, with embers and ash drifting across the foreground. Other riders or troops trail behind in the haze, implying a wider charging host. The framing is dynamic, action-forward, and emphasizes momentum and martial fury.
foreground: Mounted warrior raising a curved sword, horse mid-charge, dust and embers kicked up at hooves
background: Smoky, fire-lit battlefield with trailing riders and a wing-shaped plume of flame rising behind the rider
